title: taraxacum strictum
intro: Taraxacum strictum, also known as upright dandelion or strict dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and sesquiterpenes. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, liver and kidney disorders, and skin conditions, thanks to its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant properties. Taraxacum strictum can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, making it a versatile herbal remedy for a range of health benefits.
